description_long: This object is a tall, slender potted plant with a single, narrow trunk that extends vertically and culminates in a dense, spherical crown of long, thin, spiky green leaves. The trunk is textured and appears fibrous, resembling the rough, patterned bark of a palm or dracaena species. The foliage is lush and radiates outward in all directions, creating a visually striking, pom-pom-like effect at the top. There is no visible pot or container at the base, suggesting the plant is either cropped at the trunk or the pot is not included in the model. The leaves are a vibrant green with subtle variations in shade, giving a realistic, natural appearance. This type of plant is commonly used as a decorative accent in urban parks, sidewalks, or public plazas.
description: A tall, slender plant with a rough-textured trunk and a dense, spherical crown of long, spiky green leaves. The foliage forms a pom-pom shape at the top, with no visible pot.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full height of the plant, with the symmetrical, spherical crown of leaves clearly visible and the straight trunk centered.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the depth of the foliage and the slight curvature of the trunk, with leaves extending outward and some shadowing beneath the crown.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, displaying the dense, rounded leaf crown and the straight trunk, with less visible detail on the leaf arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights the plant's profile, showing the spread of the leaves and the trunk's vertical alignment.
attribute_plant_species: Ponytail Palm (Beaucarnea recurvata) or similar ornamental palm
